# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Tenant ID for the subscription"
      }
    },
    "servicePrincipalObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of object IDs for service principals"
      }
    },
    "userObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of object IDs for users"
      }
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable for VM deployment"
      }
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable for ARM template deployment"
      }
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable for disk encryption"
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable soft delete"
      }
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Soft delete retention period"
      }
    },
    "enableRbacAuthorization": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Use RBAC for authorization instead of access policies"
      }
    },
    "publicNetworkAccess": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Enabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Enabled",
        "Disabled"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Public network access setting"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "secretsPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list",
      "set",
      "delete",
      "recover",
      "backup",
      "restore",
      "purge"
    ],
    "keysPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list",
      "update",
      "create",
      "import",
      "delete",
      "recover",
      "backup",
      "restore",
      "decrypt",
      "encrypt",
      "unwrapKey",
      "wrapKey",
      "verify",
      "sign",
      "purge"
    ],
    "certificatesPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list",
      "update",
      "create",
      "import",
      "delete",
      "recover",
      "backup",
      "restore",
      "managecontacts",
      "manageissuers",
      "getissuers",
      "listissuers",
      "setissuers",
      "deleteissuers",
      "purge"
    ],
    "readListSecretsPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ],
    "readListKeysPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ]
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2022-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": "[parameters('enableRbacAuthorization')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[parameters('publicNetworkAccess')]",
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Allow"
        },
        "copy": [
          {
            "name": "accessPolicies",
            "count": "[add(length(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')), length(parameters('userObjectIds')))]",
            "input": {
              "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
              "objectId": "[if(less(copyIndex('accessPolicies'), length(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds'))), parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')[copyIndex('accessPolicies')], parameters('userObjectIds')[sub(copyIndex('accessPolicies'), length(parameters('servicePrincipalObjectIds')))])]",
              "permissions": {
                "secrets": "[variables('secretsPermissions')]",
                "keys": "[variables('keysPermissions')]",
                "certificates": "[variables('certificatesPermissions')]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    }
  }
}
